calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Entry Of Default Prove-Up Hearing And Judgment;
Off Calendar Jan-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Jacob Harker, Esq. for the Plaintiff Best Value Home Improvements.
Plaintiff's Witness Frank Ghorban was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by defendants Wilbur and Lucille Ford.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages/Principal - $60,800.00
Prejudgment Interest - $31,116.27
Attorney's Fees - $3,000.00
Costs - $555.00

Total $95,471.27

Judgment was submitted and signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar May-11-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
